priority_scoring_path: claude-llm: all male users affected, 100% reproducible, wrong AI/personalization output (not crash or outage), historical similar bugs triaged P1
severity_justification: The bug affects all male users across the full Social Finds feed personalization pipeline (VTON draping, Style Drops, Decoded Looks), making it a broad majority-user impact with 100% reproducibility. However, it is a wrong AI/personalization result — not a crash, checkout block, or security/secrets issue — which places it firmly at P1 rather than P0. Historical similar bugs (FLIPPI-2875, FLIPPI-2933) were both triaged P1 for the same gender mismatch class; FLIPPI-2939 was P0 but appears to be the DAO root-cause investigation ticket, not a customer-facing severity escalation.
owner_reason: Shreya Choudhary is the assignee on both FLIPPI-2875 (the likely duplicate) and FLIPPI-2939 (the ticket explicitly debugging the personaAddedAt DAO issue), making her the engineer with the most direct prior context on this root cause.
